Their only high profile arrival at the club in the winter transfer window was Lecce left-wing back Patrick Dorgu. arts.ttl: Rashford doesn't see football like I do - Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim says he failed to get Marcus Rashford to see football in the same way he does.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Leicester – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United continue their defence of the FA Cup this evening when Leicester City arrive at Old Trafford. Ruben Amorim’s team are aiming to bounce back from a disappointing defeat to Crystal Palace at the weekend. The loss was the club’s seventh on home soil in the Premier League this season. arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Leicester – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: FA Cup holders Manchester United host Leicester City tonight in the fourth round of the competition.
